title: lasiocephalus involucratus
intro: Lasiocephalus involucratus, also known as the False Pawpaw, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lasiocephalus involucratus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other infections.
